calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And To Appoint Arbitrator; Supporting Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-24-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPERANCES:
Robert Riggs, 510.597.1990 of Katzoff & Riggs for Petitioner Lucille Alderman appearing via Zoom.
Terence Mayo, 415.397.1515 of Mayo & Mayo for Responsent Storer Transportation Servive appearing via Zoom.

The Court nominates the following for ADR services: Hon. Ernest H. Godlsmith, Hon. Jmes McBride, Hon. Terence Bruiniers, Hon. Christopher Cottle and Hon. John True.

Argued. Mr. Mayo states that the petition to conpel arbitration is unnecessary. Mr. Riggs submits to the tentative ruling. The Court finds that the Respondents failure to go forward equals a refusal.

The Court rules as follows: PETITIONER LUCILLE ALDERMAN'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND TO APPOINT ARBITRATOR is Granted. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Compel Arbitration And To Appoint Arbitrator; Supporting Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Aug-12-2021 Continued To Aug-24-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
